message:
feat(stdlib): add heap-backed Array, Map, and Set collection methods with mutation tracing

Implements alloc/read/exec for heap-backed collections:

Array: alloc_array_instance, push/pop/shift/unshift/splice/reverse/fill
Map: alloc_map_instance, get/set/has/delete/clear/size
Set: alloc_set_instance, add/has/delete/clear/size

Each mutation produces a CollectionMutationTrace with SHA-256 trace-id,
before/after size, mutated keys, and step-by-step events for full audit
trails. Internal helpers handle heap snapshot read-back, class tagging,
collection-kind validation, and key hashing for Map/Set dedup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
